query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.isCombo, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementGroups cg WHERE cg.productId = p.id) as complementGroupCount,
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(cg.name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM complementGroups cg WHERE cg.productId = p.id) as groupNames
FROM products p 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 30001 AND p.isCombo = 0
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementGroups cg WHERE cg.productId = p.id) > 0
LIMIT 10
